comment.body: Reality is US banks are in an over extension or blow off top, whatever you want to call it. $680 on aggregate for GS should hold that price from going much too further above $682. It is on its Sixth straight day above the upper Bollinger band. It's up almost 10% in 5 days. It likely starts to give it back down to "$645 over next few weeks. Since banks and tech are the market, I would say there is selling to come like Alma is looking at but not immediately. Maybe starts tomorrow? Wall Street does like a Friday/Monday dump as it is harder to catch. But could last till next Friday like Alma said.
